name: certprep
description: Cert Happens provides free certification practice tests and focused study resources.

scripts.test:quiz: node --test tests/quiz.test.mjs tests/grading.test.mjs tests/reporting.test.mjs tests/routes.test.mjs tests/paged-session.test.mjs tests/paged-answers.test.mjs tests/paged-navigation.test.mjs tests/paged-entry.test.mjs tests/paged-completion.test.mjs tests/paged-flag.test.mjs tests/paged-report.test.mjs tests/paged-answer-dom.test.mjs tests/paged-client-navigation.test.mjs tests/paged-question-initialization.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:data && npm run test:quiz
scripts.build: npm run validate:data && npm test && npm run build:data && npm run build:site && npm run verify:site
scripts.start: npm run validate:data && npm run build:data && eleventy --serve
